resources.string: Requires Magisk/KernelSU (Zygisk) + LSPosed. Scope must include System Framework (android). Enforces status-bar lock, uninstall block, and non-whitelisted app veto during focus sessions.
ZenSposed uses device administration to keep focus sessions tamper-proof (prevents uninstall and force-stop during an active session).
Secondary watchdog: re-asserts the focus screen if a non-whitelisted app opens. Root + LSPosed remain required for full enforcement.
